comment: SINE +1 EXPECTS ARGUMENT IN A AND L
raw: CADR	SINE 	+1	# SINE +1 EXPECTS ARGUMENT IN A AND L
RTB	PUSH		# PUSH DOWN UNIT (LAND - R)
VXSC	PDDL		# PUSH DOWN - ELINCR(YNB * UNIT(LAND - R))
VAD	PUSH		# RESULTING VECTOR IS 1/2 REAL SIZE
DLOAD	DSU		# MAKE SURE REDESIGNATION IS NOT

comment: LOOKANGL WILL BE COMPUTED AT RGVGCALC
raw: EXIT			# LOOKANGL WILL BE COMPUTED AT RGVGCALC
VLOAD	MXV		#	OUTPUT AND TRIM CORRECTION TERM
VAD	VSR2		# RESCALE TO UNITS OF 2(9) M/CS
STOVL	VHORIZ		# VHORIZ FOR DISPLAY DURING P65.
VSU	PUSH		# PUSH DOWN R - LAND
RTB	DOT		# NOW IN MPAC IS SINE(LOOKANGL)/4
STODL	TABLTTF +4	# A(2) = 6 ADG  TO TABLTTF
STORE	TABLTTF		# A(0) = -24 (RGU  - RDG )/64 TO TABLTTF
AFCCALC1	VXM	VSL1		# VERGUID COMES HERE
STORE	UNFC/2		# UNFC/2 NEED NOT BE UNITIZED
AFCCALC2	STODL	/AFC/		# MAGNITUDE OF AFC FOR THROTTLE
DSU	DSU		# AMAXHORIZ = SQRT(ATOTAL - A  - A  )
STORE	UNWC/2		# UNIT(LAND - R) IS TENTATIVE CHOICE

comment: WITH PROJ IN MPAC 1/8 REAL SIZE
raw: EXIT			# WITH PROJ IN MPAC 1/8 REAL SIZE

comment: SCALE MPAC TO M/CS *2(-7) AND PUSH 	(6)
raw: ITRPNT1		VXSC	PDDL		# SCALE MPAC TO M/CS *2(-7) AND PUSH 	(6)

comment: 30-31D CONTAINS TIME IN CS SINCE PIPTIME
raw: STORE	30D		# 30-31D CONTAINS TIME IN CS SINCE PIPTIME
STODL	HDOTDISP	# UPDATE HDOTDISP RATE FOR NOUN 63.
STODL	HCALC1		# UPDATE HCALC1 FOR NOUN 63.
VLOAD			# PICK UP UPDATED VELOCITY VECTOR.
STODL	G(CSM)		# CSM GRAVITY VEC. -- M/CS*2(7)
STORE	TDEC1		# RELOAD TDEC1 FOR MIDTOAV.
STORE	ABVEL		# INITIALIZE ABVEL FOR P63 DISPLAY

comment: FIRST SET UP INPUTS FOR RP-TO-R:-
raw: IGNALG		SETPD	VLOAD		# FIRST SET UP INPUTS FOR RP-TO-R:-

comment: ALSO SET TPIP FOR FIRST GUIDANCE PASS
raw: STCALL	TPIP		# ALSO SET TPIP FOR FIRST GUIDANCE PASS

comment: INTEGRATE STATE FORWARD TO THAT TIME
raw: STCALL	TDEC1		# INTEGRATE STATE FORWARD TO THAT TIME
STOVL	DELTAH		# INITIALIZE DELTAH FOR V16N68 DISPLAY
STODL	UNFC/2		# INITIALIZE TRIM VELOCITY CORRECTION TERM

comment: STORE NEW GUESS FOR NEXT INTEGRATION
raw: STODL	TDEC1		# STORE NEW GUESS FOR NEXT INTEGRATION

comment: COMPUTE DISTANCE LANDING SITE WILL BE
raw: STOVL	TIG		# COMPUTE DISTANCE LANDING SITE WILL BE

comment: SIGN IS + IF LANDING SITE IS TO THE
raw: VXV	UNIT		#   SIGN IS + IF LANDING SITE IS TO THE
R60INIT		STOVL	OUTOFPLN	# INITIALIZATION FOR CALCMANU
STORE	R60VSAVE	# STORE UNFC/2 TEMPORARILY IN R60SAVE

comment: GO PICK UP DISPLAY AT END OF R51:
raw: SSP	RTB		# GO PICK UP DISPLAY AT END OF R51:
P63SPOT2	VLOAD	UNIT		# INITIALIZE KALCMANU FOR BURN ATTITUDE

comment: COMPUTE RLS AND STORE IT AWAY
raw: SETPD	VLOAD		# COMPUTE RLS AND STORE IT AWAY
